title: Show WSL rootfs version when downloading
body:
Currently the download of the rootfs only shows a name.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1894/178897178-8aa51ed8-d62b-4058-82a7-fc7b4723a6c5.png)

Recently a version got included to the image repo that is formatted as `v[Fedora version].[image increment]`, eg. https://github.com/containers/podman-wsl-fedora/releases/tag/v36.0.6

Showing this as part of the download can aid in tracking possible issues.

_Originally posted in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14698#issuecomment-1183967519_

comments.body: I think this was already added in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14962?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
